settings.heading: Menopause is more than just symptoms—**it’s a health inflection point.**

settings.callout_items:
Hot flashes
Night Sweats
Sleep Disruption
Mood changes

settings.text: These are the visible signs of menopause. But beneath the surface, a deeper biological shift is happening. As estrogen declines, Nitric Oxide production drops, impairing blood flow and increasing long-term cardiovascular risk.
Advanced 2-in-1 menopause and heart health support, clinically formulated for women in midlife to address symptoms today while promoting long-term heart health.

settings.highlight: Relieves hot flashes and night sweats

settings.text: We recommend 3-6 month of consistent use for results.

settings.heading: Details
settings.content:
Menopause is more than a hormonal shift — it’s also a vascular transition. As estrogen levels decline, Nitric Oxide production naturally decreases, which can affect blood flow, thermoregulation, energy levels, and heart health. These underlying changes may contribute to common midlife symptoms like hot flashes, sleep disruption, fatigue, mood shifts, and reduced sexual wellness.

Menopause + Heart Health Support is designed to address both symptom relief and vascular support. Featuring clinically researched, non-hormonal ingredients, this dual-action formula helps reduce hot flashes and support balanced mood while promoting healthy Nitric Oxide production and circulation during and beyond menopause.

settings.heading: Key Ingredients
settings.content:
Nitric Oxide Support
As estrogen declines, Nitric Oxide production drops — impacting blood flow, vascular function, and blood pressure. This ingredient helps support healthy Nitric Oxide levels to promote heart health and overall vascular performance during menopause.

Purified Pollen Extract
Clinically studied for menopausal support, purified pollen extract helps relieve vasomotor symptoms such as hot flashes and night sweats, while also supporting sleep quality and mood.

Turmeric Extract
A potent botanical known for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Turmeric supports joint comfort, cardiovascular health, and overall inflammatory balance during midlife transition.

settings.heading: suggested use
settings.content:
Take 1 Nitrate Complex capsule and 1 Pollen Complex capsule together daily, with water after food. Do not exceed the recommended daily intake unless under the direction of your provider.

Suitable for vegetarians and vegans. Made without most allergens (milk, eggs, fish, shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soy). Gluten and gelatin free.

settings.heading: Who Is this for
settings.content:
Berkeley Life Menopause and Heart Health Support delivers daily, non-hormonal symptom relief while supporting what many women overlook during menopause: their heart. It is the smart place to start to feel relief today for resilience tomorrow.

Especially helpful for women who aren’t ready for HRT or cannot take it. It can also complement HRT by supporting Nitric Oxide levels and healthy vascular function during this transition.

settings.heading: Menopause Symptom Relief
settings.text: Menopause can bring hot flashes, night sweats, and sleep changes that disrupt daily life. This formula helps relieve common vasomotor and mood-related symptoms to support greater comfort and balance.

settings.heading: LONG-TERM HEALTH
settings.text: At the same time, declining estrogen can reduce Nitric Oxide production, impacting blood flow and heart health. By supporting Nitric Oxide levels, it also promotes heart health during and beyond menopause.

settings.heading: Dual-Action Formula.  One Daily Habit. Whole Body Support
settings.text: Most solutions focus only on symptom relief. Berkeley Life provides effective relief while also supporting your long-term health. All in one simple, non-hormonal daily habit.

settings.heading: What is Berkeley Life Menopause & Heart Health Support?
settings.content:
Berkeley Life Menopause & Heart Health Support is a two-capsule daily, non-hormonal formula designed to support women during perimenopause and postmenopause.
Each daily serving includes:

  • 1 Nitric Oxide (NO) capsule providing ~250 mg dietary nitrates
  • 1 Meno Blend capsule containing purified cytoplasmic pollen extract (PCP), turmeric, and rice bran

Together, they support:

  • Reduction of hot flashes and night sweats
  • Improved sleep quality
  • Mood balance
  • Energy and circulation
  • Preventive cardiovascular support during estrogen decline

settings.heading: Who is this product for?
settings.content:
This formula is designed for:

  • Women 40+ navigating perimenopause
  • Postmenopausal women
  • Women seeking non-hormonal support
  • Women wanting to protect heart health as estrogen declines

It may be used by women who choose not to use hormone replacement therapy (HRT), as well as those currently using HRT who want additional vascular support.

settings.heading: Why does menopause affect heart health?
settings.content:
As estrogen declines, nitric oxide production decreases.
Estrogen normally supports endothelial nitric oxide synthase (eNOS), the enzyme responsible for producing nitric oxide in blood vessels. When estrogen levels drop:

  • Nitric oxide production declines
  • Blood vessels become less flexible
  • Oxidative stress increases
  • Vascular stiffness rises

This shift contributes to the increased cardiovascular risk seen after menopause.
Supporting nitric oxide production is an important part of preventive vascular care.

settings.heading: How long does it take to work?
settings.content:
Month 1:
Many women notice fewer hot flashes and improved sleep onset.
Month 2:
Mood stability and energy may continue improving.
Month 3:
Clinical research on dietary nitrates shows measurable improvements in vascular function at 12 weeks.
Individual results vary.

settings.heading: Why is there only one Nitric Oxide capsule instead of two?
settings.content:
The menopause formula combines nitric oxide support with the pollen blend for complementary benefits.
One NO capsule provides foundational vascular support while the Meno Blend addresses vasomotor, mood, and sleep symptoms.
Women who previously used two NO capsules daily may:

  • Transition to the menopause formula alone
  • Add an additional NO capsule if needed
  • Monitor nitric oxide levels using Berkeley Life Test Strips

Consult your healthcare provider for personalized dosing.

settings.heading: Can I take this with hormone replacement therapy (HRT)?
settings.content:
Yes.
This formula is non-hormonal and may complement HRT by supporting vascular function and circulation.Always consult your prescribing provider before combining therapies.
